Live stats

Aggregate slot performance, refreshed every 5 minutes. The third leg of the trust stool: verify any round · how it works · see the numbers.

— loading —

Data is direct from the slot-rounds ledger. Every row is also visible to the round's owner via GET /api/slot/rounds and to operators via GET /api/admin/slot-rounds; the public surface here is the same data, aggregated and stripped of any per-user identifier.
